niche: E-Commerce Agency — complete integration of shop, PIM, DAM, CMS and AI, developed and operated under one roof
voice: Direct, no-fluff. We get straight to the point and tell it like it is. We use 'you' without being overly familiar. We speak to decision-makers at mid-market to enterprise e-commerce brands — no fluff, just results.

copyRules.tone: Direct, no-fluff. Decision-maker audience. No hedging.
